case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS KESSEL, ALFRED

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 486700 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT KESSEL, ALFRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KESSEL, ALFRED $1,081.82 PRINCIPAL, $1,081.82 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,177.64, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 486700. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 3/15/89. MAILED 3/22/89. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
